name: Jack Costanzo
abstract: Jack James Costanzo (September 24, 1919 – August 18, 2018) was an American percussionist.

concerts.label: Woody Herman and His Orchestra and The Nat King Cole Trio
Woody Herman and His Orchestra and The Nat King Cole Trio

works.t: No No Nanette: Tea for Two

about_quotes.speaker: Pete Candoli
about_quotes.evidence: And that was my thing before going with Peggy Lee, with Jimmy Rowles, Joe Mondragon, Jack Costanzo was on bongos
about_quotes.doc_title: Pete Candoli interviewed by Monk Rowe, Los Angeles, California, February 15, 1999

about_quotes.speaker: Louie Bellson
about_quotes.evidence: they told Jack Costanzo with Nat King Cole he couldn’t appear because of the racial thing you know.
about_quotes.doc_title: Louie Bellson interviewed by Monk Rowe, Sarasota, Florida, April 12, 1996
